derivedSeedRule: baseSeed + replicateIndex * 1000003 + trackIndex * 1009 + weatherIndex * 101; controls reuse the exact derived seed

exposureDefinitions.eligibleCatch: A faster rear car satisfies the intent-specific closing/proximity gate.
exposureDefinitions.passAttempt: An attack maneuver whose feasible lane authority reaches its computed launch point or acquires physical body overlap; prelaunch intent selections are not attempts.
exposureDefinitions.sideBySideSecond: One simulated second with longitudinal body overlap and two usable lateral corridors.
exposureDefinitions.carKilometre: One active racing-surface car travelling 1000 metres.
exposureDefinitions.obligationEpisode: One contiguous interval in which the stateless blue-flag, qualifying, or damage relation is true for a pair.
exposureDefinitions.pitConflict: One overlapping swept-volume queue, box crossing, release, or merge reservation.

separationRule: Calibration, validation, and release seeds are pairwise disjoint and must not be reassigned to make a result pass.
